name: JellySlate
author: grimmdev
description: A clean, minimal dark theme for Jellyfin. Fully configurable accent color, background, text color, card radius, and font family. Optional frosted glass and extra-rounded corners addons.

vars.name: Accent Color
vars.description: Applied to buttons, links, active tabs, and progress bars.

vars.name: Background Color
vars.description: Main page background. Use a dark color for best results.

vars.name: Text Color
vars.description: Primary text color across the interface.

vars.name: Card Radius
vars.description: Corner radius applied to media cards and dialogs.

vars.name: Font Family
vars.description: Font stack for the entire interface. Use any system font or a Google Fonts @import in a custom CSS addon.

vars.name: Frosted Glass
vars.description: Adds backdrop-filter blur to the sidebar, header, and dialogs.

vars.name: Extra Rounded
vars.description: Applies stronger corner rounding to the sidebar, header, and dialogs.

addons.name: Frosted Glass
addons.description: Backdrop blur on the navigation drawer, header, and all dialogs.

addons.name: Extra Rounded
addons.description: Stronger corner rounding on the sidebar, header, dialogs, inputs, and buttons.
